CustomField.description: Checkbox similar as "Inform Car Fleet Manager On Case Opened" and by a workflow rule should send an specific email to the Car Fleet Manager on his approval request.Reviewed in June 2020. Reviewed during CCCM
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checkbox similar as "Inform Car Fleet Manager On Case Opened" and by a workflow rule should send an specific email to the Car Fleet Manager on his approval request
CustomField.label: Request Car Fleet Manager Approval
